CustomField.formula: IF(NATT_Number_of_eSolutions_Plan_1__c > 0,"Plan 1 : Monitor Only (Cellular Only)" & BR(),"")& IF(NATT_Number_of_eSolutions_Plan_2__c > 0,"Plan 2 : Monitor And Control (Cellular Only)" & BR(),"") & IF(NATT_Number_of_eSolutions_Plan_3__c > 0,"Plan 3 : Monitor And Enhanced Control (Cellular Only)","")
CustomField.label: Lynx Fleet Plans For Email
